description: backend: crash-recovery integration test (kill worker mid-job)
context: Create backend/tests/api_crash.rs: start server ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1+ANVILML_MOCK_NODE_DELAY_MS=2000; submit mock job; get worker PID via GET /v1/workers; kill PID (libc::kill unix / TerminateProcess windows cfg-gated); assert WS events: worker Dead, job Failed{error:worker_crashed}, worker Respawning, worker Idle; submit second job; assert Completed. cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware --test api_crash exits 0.

description: backend: OpenAPI regeneration + clippy clean pass
context: Run cargo run -p anvilml-openapi; if diff on backend/openapi.json commit it. Run cargo clippy --workspace --features mock-hardware -- -D warnings; fix ALL warnings in any file (pre-existing counts). Run cargo test -p anvilml --features mock-hardware -- config_reference. All three exit 0. No warnings remain.

description: docs/TESTS.md: complete test catalogue for all phases
context: Create docs/TESTS.md per ANVILML_DESIGN.md §16.1 format: one entry per test file in crates/*/tests/, backend/tests/, worker/tests/. Each entry: test name, file, context (preconditions), what it verifies, inputs, expected output. ANVILML_WORKER_MOCK=1 python -m pytest worker/tests/ -v exits 0; cargo test --workspace --features mock-hardware exits 0.
